entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A primary staple crop (Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br.) grown and consumed in West Africa and Niger

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The origin and epicenter of pearl millet genetic diversity

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A standalone country in West Africa that produces pearl millet

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of pearl millet, which is currently low in Niger

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A factor whose low level contributes to low grain yield

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An environmental stressor contributing to low grain yield

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease affecting pearl millet productivity

entities.name: HEAD MINER
entities.description: A pest affecting pearl millet productivity

entities.name: IMPROVED SEEDS
entities.description: Quality seeds whose non-utilization contributes to low grain yield

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional value of crops, specifically for Fe and Zn

entities.name: DOSSO REGION
entities.description: A region in Niger where the participatory study was conducted

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health condition persisting at high rates in the Dosso region

entities.name: BREEDING PRIORITIES
entities.description: Key traits preferred by farmers for the development of pearl millet varieties and hybrids

entities.name: GENDER-BASED SEGREGATION
entities.description: An analytical approach used to identify breeding priorities

entities.name: STRUCTURED QUESTIONNAIRES
entities.description: A data collection tool used to survey farmers

entities.name: FOCUS GROUPS
entities.description: A data collection tool used to survey farmers

entities.name: DOGONDOUTCHI
entities.description: A representative department in the Dosso region

entities.name: DOSSO
entities.description: A representative department in the Dosso region

entities.name: GAYA
entities.description: A representative department in the Dosso region

entities.name: LONG PANICLE
entities.description: A physical characteristic of pearl millet preferred by farmers

entities.name: GOOD SEED SET
entities.description: A physical characteristic of pearl millet preferred by farmers

entities.name: WHITE COLOR
entities.description: A grain color characteristic of pearl millet preferred by farmers

entities.name: LARGER SIZE
entities.description: A grain size characteristic of pearl millet preferred by farmers

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop that competes with pearl millet grains in the market

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A nutritional element (Fe) targeted for biofortification in pearl millet

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A nutritional element (Zn) targeted for biofortification in pearl millet

entities.name: GRAIN DECORTICATION
entities.description: The process of removing the outer layer of grain before consumption, which depletes nutrition
